D:\Software\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libstream_core.a CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/types.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/bounded_queue.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/metrics_collector.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/reconnect_controller.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/clip_exporter.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/ffmpeg_decoder.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/stream_session.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/stream_manager.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/stream_core.dir/src/c_api.cpp.obj
D:\Software\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libstream_core.a
